title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 161.529 - Duties imposed on boards of education, how enforced
text:
161.529.  Duties imposed on boards of education, how enforced. — Duties and requirements imposed on members of boards of education by section 161.520, 161.525, or 161.527, either expressed or implied, shall be enforceable by the provisions contained in section 162.091.
(L. 1992 S.B. 581 § 4) 
Effective 4-17-92
